value:
Differences in Modal 1:

The X close button is removed.
Clicking outside of the modal is ignored (but causes nice flicker in windows with chrome).
Style changes in Main() to pretty it up.
Added a nice spinner.
To stop a user from doing anything, get rid of the cancel button.
For example, if the app must wait for a response from the server. Remember, if the server times out, you can toggle the Modal off in the err event.
